instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings. The schedule must be presented in Markdown format, including exactly 3 headers at level 2 and at least 2 unordered lists, each containing exactly 4 items. Include the phrase "collaborative brainstorming session" in the schedule. Use the keyword "update" as a verb. Ensure the tone of the schedule is formal and professional throughout. The response must contain exactly 8 sentences, with the first paragraph containing exactly 3 sentences and the second paragraph containing exactly 5 sentences. Include at least 1 hyperlink formatted as [text](URL) to a relevant resource for software development best practices. Include the phrase "Let's chill and crush some code together!"
response:
The team will commence the week with a collaborative brainstorming session to define the core requirements for the new app feature. Each developer must update their task tracking system with the initial design specifications before the afternoon stand-up meeting. This structured approach ensures that all members align on the project goals before diving into implementation.

Coding activities will dominate Monday through Wednesday, followed by rigorous testing protocols on Thursday and Friday. The schedule includes a dedicated slot for a collaborative brainstorming session on Tuesday to refine the user interface logic. Developers should refer to [Software Development Life Cycle Best Practices](https://www.agilealliance.org/glossary/sdlc) for guidance on maintaining code quality. Let's chill and crush some code together! Please ensure that every code commit includes a descriptive message to facilitate future updates.

Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and.new_constraint: Include the phrase "Let's chill and crush some code together!"
Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and.org_constraint: Ensure the tone of the schedule is formal and professional throughout.
